message:
Fix: Resolve Next.js React memory leaks and strict-mode hook immutability violations

- React: Fix runaway setInterval loop memory leaks in `giil-lesson` and `dsr-lesson` by properly wiring refs into cleanup blocks
- React: Fix strict mode array mutation violation (`length = 0`) on dependency ref arrays in SLB simulation
- TS: Resolve 'possibly undefined' and global ambient type modifier collisions for `window.dataLayer` and `window.gtag` across analytics stack
- TS: Fix unhandled null/undefined states on Next.js `usePathname` and `useSearchParams` inside Wizard routing logic
- Perf: Move massive `playwright` integration testing suite into devDependencies to drastically reduce Vercel production build output size and speed up deployment

files.patch:
@@ -3,11 +3,11 @@
   "version": "0.3.0",
   "private": true,
   "scripts": {
-    "dev": "next dev --turbopack",
+    "dev": "next dev",
     "build": "next build",
     "start": "next start",
     "lint": "eslint . --cache",
-    "type-check": "tsc --noEmit",
+    "type-check": "next typegen && tsc --noEmit --incremental false",
     "test": "playwright test",
     "test:ui": "playwright test --ui",
     "test:headed": "playwright test --headed",
@@ -34,7 +34,6 @@
     "framer-motion": "^12.23.26",

-    "playwright": "^1.58.2",
